creator: antik@pcbsd.org
text:
LCD screen remains blank after Dell XPS M1210 lid is closed and reopened. Looks like LCD screen was not resumed from power-saving mode. System works without problem though- I am able to log in over ssh. Changing consoles with Alt+Fx does not give any change in screen behavior. Only solution is to type reboot- restart brings screen back.

Hardware:
CPU: Intel Core 2 T5500 @1.66GHz
Video: Intel 945GM
dmesg included.

Fix: Not known.

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: Close lid and reopen it.
